room.caption: [CLFP] At one point in the game's development. There was going to be more to the right up there.

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sBubblun_Idle image_speed=0.05 image_xscale=-1 talker="Bubblun" stringToShow="Keep going and you'll find the ship." boxSize=2
if global.gameProgress>=4500 {instance_destroy()}

sprite_index=sLovelun_Idle image_speed=0.05 image_xscale=-1 talker="Lovelun" stringToShow="Be careful. There are sure to be guards around the ship." boxSize=2
if global.gameProgress>=4500 {instance_destroy()}
